title: 有馬記念の後に・燃料、満タンで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun runs with everything she's got
and emerges victorious. Delighted after defeating
Narita Brian, she can't contain her excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then realizes that Narita Brian is not yet
satisfied, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to give her yet another exciting bout
at the Hanshin Daishoten.
